title: Everbuild Power Pro Heavy Duty Applicator Gun | Cartridge Caulks, Sealants, Adhesives - Professional Heavy Duty Applicator, Suitable for High Viscosity Products - 310ml - Black
seller_info_text: Sold by Amazon Resale and Fulfilled by Amazon.
features: High quality, heavy duty skeleton sealant gun for standard cartridges. High performance, fitted with the "Dripless" system.
To enable extrusion of any product from standard cartridges. Suitable for all cartridge applied adhesives, fillers and sealants.
Engineered to be stronger than standard skeleton guns featuring robust powder coated steel construction for heavy duty use.
Finger moulded trigger smoothly drives plunger for continuous flow during application and reduced hand fatigue.
Very high thrust ratio for quick, consistent application using the least effort, and can be used easily for very high-viscosity materials
description: From the manufacturer Ensure the surface you are applying the sealant/adhesive to is completely clean with no dust. Then cut off the end of the sealant nozzle at a 45 degree angle. Insert the cartridge into the sealant gun and practise using it on some old newspaper. You will want to get the hang of applying the sealant in even quantities. Be careful not to squeeze the trigger too hard or the sealant will shoot out. Be gentle and increase pressure gradually. Place the nozzle of the tube against the surface of where you want the sealant/adhesive applied and gently squeeze the trigger as you have practised. Holding the gun at a 45 degree angle, move it along the length of the area you want bonded once the sealant starts to come out of the nozzle. Once you have finished, press the release catch at the back of the sealant gun which will stop all pressure on the tube.
